scripts.build: node scripts/fetch-youtube.cjs && vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');['index.html','pricing.html','reservation.html','directions.html','faq.html','floor-guide.html','privacy.html','terms.html','404.html','mission.html','checkup.html','manifest.json','sitemap.xml','sitemap-main.xml','sitemap-area.xml','sitemap-encyclopedia.xml','robots.txt','6f74445f7ec14eccb522a4d3f253128c.txt','blueprint.html','llms.txt','llms-full.txt','flight.html','games.html','run.html','_redirects'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.copyFileSync(f,'dist/'+f)}catch(e){}});['css','js','images','treatments','doctors','column','blog','video','cases','notice','auth','admin','area','faq','encyclopedia'].forEach(d=>{try{cp.execSync('mkdir -p dist/'+d+' && cp -rT '+d+' dist/'+d)}catch(e){}});cp.execSync('mkdir -p dist/data && cp -rT public/data dist/data');const routes=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/_routes.json','utf8'));if(!routes.include.includes('/encyclopedia/*')){routes.include.push('/encyclopedia/*');}if(!routes.include.includes('/admin/*')){routes.include.push('/admin/*');}if(!routes.include.includes('/admin')){routes.include.push('/admin');}if(!routes.include.includes('/cases/*')){routes.include.push('/cases/*');}if(!routes.include.includes('/flight')){routes.include.push('/flight');}if(!routes.include.includes('/games')){routes.include.push('/games');}if(!routes.include.includes('/run')){routes.include.push('/run');}if(!routes.include.includes('/column/*')){routes.include.push('/column/*');}if(!routes.include.includes('/column')){routes.include.push('/column');}if(!routes.include.includes('/doctors/*')){routes.include.push('/doctors/*');}if(!routes.include.includes('/bdx')){routes.include.push('/bdx');}if(!routes.include.includes('/bdx/*')){routes.include.push('/bdx/*');}if(!routes.include.includes('/local-seo')){routes.include.push('/local-seo');}if(!routes.include.includes('/tables/*')){routes.include.push('/tables/*');}routes.exclude=routes.exclude.filter(e=>e!=='/cases/*'&&e!=='/column/*'&&e!=='/doctors/*');fs.writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json',JSON.stringify(routes,null,2));cp.execSync('mkdir -p dist/tables/treatments/treatments');fs.writeFileSync('dist/tables/treatments/treatments/gum.html','<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/pricing"><link rel="canonical" href="https://bdbddc.com/pricing"></head><body>Redirecting...</body></html>');fs.writeFileSync('dist/tables/treatments/implant.html','<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/pricing"><link rel="canonical" href="https://bdbddc.com/pricing"></head><body>Redirecting...</body></html>');console.log('Static files synced to dist + _routes.json patched')"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name seoul-bd-dental
